injectCSS: body::before{background:radial-gradient(circle at 14% 20%,rgba(255,92,255,0.24),transparent 24%),radial-gradient(circle at 84% 16%,rgba(92,255,243,0.24),transparent 22%),radial-gradient(circle at 52% 88%,rgba(132,255,139,0.16),transparent 28%)}section#main_shell,section.mod_column,section#filesystem{box-shadow:0 0 2.6vh rgba(92,255,243,0.18),0 0 5vh rgba(255,92,255,0.12),inset 0 0 1.4vh rgba(132,255,139,0.07)}div#main_shell_actions>button,div#main_shell_statusline>span,#skynetOpsCenter .skynet_card,#skynetWorkspace .workspace_card,#skynetWorkspace .workspace_panel{box-shadow:0 0 2vh rgba(92,255,243,0.22),0 0 2.6vh rgba(255,92,255,0.1),inset 0 0 1vh rgba(132,255,139,0.09)}div.keyboard_key{box-shadow:0 0 1.2vh rgba(92,255,243,0.14),0 0 1.8vh rgba(255,92,255,0.08),inset 0 0 1vh rgba(132,255,139,0.06)}ul#main_shell_tabs>li.active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5cfff3 0%,#ff5cff 100%);color:#0d0820}.xterm .xterm-screen canvas{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 0.85vh rgba(92,255,243,0.28))}
